products.name: Park & Ride (formerly Long Stay) — drive-up
products.notes: Official drive-up tariff: £46.80 first 24h + £37.40 per subsequent 24h. 3/7/14-day totals computed from those official per-day rates (3d=46.80+2x37.40; 7d=46.80+6x37.40; 14d=46.80+13x37.40).

products.name: Long Stay — roll-up (drive-up)
products.notes: Official roll-up tariff: £38 first 24h + £32 per subsequent 24h. 3/7/14-day totals computed from those official per-day rates (3d=38+2x32; 7d=38+6x32; 14d=38+13x32).

products.name: Turn Up & Park — T2 West Multi Storey (P3)
products.notes: Official Turn Up & Park tariff: £61.40 for up to 24h and for each 24h thereafter (flat). 3/7/14-day totals computed from that official per-day rate.

products.name: JetParks (pre-book only) — published 'from' price
products.notes: Officially published pre-book 'from' price: 'From £59.99 (8 days)'. JetParks is pre-book only. Single published 'from' point; not a live-quoted 3/7/14-day ladder — gate product above provides the 3/7/14 coverage.

products.name: Mid Stay — Turn Up & Park (drive-up)
products.notes: Official Turn Up & Park tariff: Mid Stay £48 per 24h and for each 24h thereafter (flat). 3/7/14-day totals computed from that official per-day rate. (Short Stay drive-up is £70/24h.)

products.name: Long Stay (pre-book) — published 'from' price
products.notes: Officially published pre-book 'from' price: 'From £71.99' for an 8-day stay (sample dates Oct 2026, read 2026-06-10). Single published 'from' point; gate product above provides the 3/7/14 coverage.

products.name: Long Stay — on-the-day (drive-up)
products.notes: Official on-the-day tariff: Long Stay £30.00 'each additional day, or part of a day'. Treated as a flat £30/day; 3/7/14-day totals computed from that official per-day rate. (Mid Stay on-the-day is £35/day.) FLAG: a distinct first-day rate is not separately published; this assumes a flat daily rate.

products.name: Long Stay — drive-up (roll-up)
products.notes: Official drive-up Long Stay tariff: 3-24h £60.00, then £40.00 per day (or part) thereafter (0-30 min free). 3/7/14-day totals computed from those official per-day rates (3d=60+2x40; 7d=60+6x40; 14d=60+13x40).

products.name: Car Park 7 — off-site Long Stay (turn-up)
products.notes: Official turn-up tariff for Car Park 7 (the off-site long-stay car park): up to 24h £49.00, then £42.00 per day (or part) thereafter. 3/7/14-day totals computed from those official per-day rates (3d=49+2x42; 7d=49+6x42; 14d=49+13x42). FLAG: birminghamairport.co.uk is Cloudflare-blocked to every automated transport; figures read from the official birminghamairport.co.uk turn-up-prices page captured in the Wayback Machine on 2025-09-06. Re-confirm against the live 2026 tariff.

products.name: Silver Zone — long stay gate price (drive-up)
products.notes: Official Silver Zone gate (drive-up) prices: 3 Days £100.00, 4 Days £135.00, 5 Days £170.00, each additional day (or part) thereafter £35.00. Published 3-day total used directly; 7/14-day totals computed from the official 3-day base plus the official £35/day (7d=100+4x35; 14d=100+11x35). 5-day cross-check matches (100+2x35=170).

products.name: Long Stay — turn-up (roll-up / drive-up)
products.notes: Official Long Stay 'TURN UP PRICES' (roll-up/drive-up) table: up to 1h free; 2h £15; 1 day £50.00; 2 days £65.00; 3 days £80.00; each additional day (or part) thereafter £15.00. 3-day total used directly (£80); 7/14-day totals computed from the official 3-day base plus the official £15/day (7d=80+4x15; 14d=80+11x15). 2-day cross-check matches (£65 = 50+15). FLAG: glasgowairport.com is Cloudflare-blocked to plain fetch tools; this official turn-up table was obtained by rendering the official Long Stay page through the jina reader's headless-browser engine (X-Engine: browser) on 2026-06-10.

products.name: Long Stay (pre-book) — published 'from' price
products.notes: Officially published pre-book 'from' price: '1-week (7-day) Long Stay from £49.99' (read 2026-06-10). Single published 'from' point; the gate product above provides the 3/7/14 coverage.
